2.1.0 
M/s IDEA Obligations: 
2.1.1 M/s IDEA shall provide extstmg Telecom Sites including its operation and maintenance 
services on shared basis to the Sharing Operator as per Schedule I and Schedule 2 of this 
Agreement, respectively. M/s IDEA shall provide Telecom sites with Passive Infrastructure as 
per Schedule I that can be used by the Sharing Operator. 
2.1.2 M/s IDEA shall be fully responsible for the security, maintenance and operations of the 
Telecom Site and its Passive Infrastructure as specified in the Service Level Agreement 
annexed hereto. 
2.1.3 M/s IDEA shall be responsible for proper upkeep of the electric meter and the DG sets. 
2.1.4 M/s IDEA shall undertake maintenance activities of Passive Infrastructure at mutually agreed 
planned outage periods. 
2.1.5 M/s IDEA shall be responsible for the statutory compliances and liasioning with 
municipal/government bodies in connection with the Passive Infrastructure and Services 
covered under this Agreement 
2.1.6 M/s IDEA shall be responsible for the payment of statuary levies/municipal charges and 
monthly consumption charges of power and fuel. 
2.1.7 M/s IDEA shall ensure that appropriate land purchase agreements/lease agreements/license 
agreements are in place for the Telecom Sites at the time of Site sharing by the Sharing 
Operator and during the provisioning of Services, as contemplated here under this Agreement 
2.1.8 Should an additional External Sharing Operator be offered an existing Site where Sharing 
Operator is operating, and such External Sharing Operator shall require alteration of the 
existing Site, such alteration shall be carried out by M/s !DEA (including changing of position 
of the TE) provided that M/s IDEA shall inform the Sharing Operator about the necessary 
alterations at least 15 days in advance and shall coordinate and cooperate with the Sharing 
Operator so that any such alterations shall not adversely affect the quality and performance of 
TE and shall be performed with minimum disturbance of the activities of the Sharing Operator 
on the Site and at no cost to the Sharing Operator, either directly or indirectly. 
2.1.9 M/s IDEA shall monitor and control all Passive Telecom Infrastructure alarms, and in the 
event of any occurrence of such alarms do the necessary actions to maintain the Service Levels 
of the Sites. M/s IDEA shall also provide extension of Passive Telecom Infrastructure alarms 
to an alarm box on best effort basis which Sharing Operator can extend the same to the 
Sharing Operator's NOC. 
2.1.1 0 M/s IDEA shall provide to the Sharing Operator, the co-ordinates (Latitude and longitude) of 
the existing Telecom Sites which BSNL will share, based on requirements submitted by 
Sharing Operator from time to time. 
2.2.0 
Sharing Operator Obligations: 
2.2.1 The Sharing Operator agrees to utilize such Passive Telecom Infrastructure on shared basis 
with M/s IDEA and also with other External Sharing Operators of M/s IDEA.

Sharing Operator shall ensure that all the safety measure as mandated/required/desirable for 
the execution of the job. are properly taken care of by his employees. 
Common Obligations of Parties

installed at the same Site. In case or such obstruction or damage. the Party causing such 
obstruction or damage will be liable to compensate any expense to restore/repair the same. 
2.3 .2 Each Party shall ensure that neither its employees, nor the officers and agents violate the terms 
of this Agreement.

the Passive Telecom Infrastructure, M/s IDEA shall make all reasonable efforts to enable the 
Sharing Operator to install its TE . The material defects, if any, should be brought to the notice

ofl'er Intimation" 3 days prior to clearance of such defects. The RFIE Date of that particular

3.3 If the defects are not notified within 10 days frolll the receipt of Notice of Readiness by the 
Sharing Operator, then the Site is deemed to have been made available to the Sharing Operator 
on R Fl E date of that respective Sit e. 
3.4 The Parties shall sign individual "Site Agreement" within 7 clays from the RFIE Date. The 
Sharing Operator will be given a time period of 15 clays to mount/install its TE after the RFIE 
date. 
The Comme.ncement date shall be considered as 15 days from the RFIE date.

6.0 
PROCEDURES :roBE FOLLOWED BEFORE INSTALLATION OF SI-IARING OPERATOR 
EQUIPMENTS 
6.1 
M/s IDEA has agreed to share its existing Sites, in all the circles in India acknowledged by 
M/s BSNL, on non-exclusive basis to the Sharing Operator. 
Confidential 
II

6.2 
The Sharing Operator has agreed to order Services in respect of GBT sites and RTT sites out 
of the Sites of M/s IDEA. The Sharing Operator agrees and understands that the locations/site 
co-ordinates of the suitable Sites shall be given reasonably in advance for enabling M/s IDEA 
to plan out the up-gradation activities (mutually agreed) of the existing infrastructure at such 
Sites to make it sharable within mutually agreed time frame. 
6.3 
Both the Parties shall jointly work together to finalize the Site locations as per the operational 
requirements of the Sharing Operator and to finalize the delivery period/roll out plan. etc. 
6.4 
The Sharing Operator shall thereafter place a separate Site Request for each Site; M/s IDEA 
shall convey its acceptance to the Sharing Operator within 2 weeks of receipt of the Site 
Request as a Site proposal. The Sharing Operator shall issue a Service Order within one week 
from the date of Site Proposal, which shall be accepted by M/s IDEA within one week 
thereafter. In the event M/s BSNL desires any changes/amendments in the Service Order, the 
Parties shall mutually decide the same and thereafter within one ( 1) week the Sharing Operator 
shall issue a revised Service Order to M/s IDEA. Upon acceptance of the Service 
Order/revised Service Order as the cas~ may be by M/s IDEA, the same shall be treated as a 
valid Service Order and will form part of this Agreement. 
6.5 
M/s IDEA will normally make available the RFIE (Ready For Installation of Equipment) sites 
to the Sharing Operator within 30 days or as mutually agreed as per Rollout Plan of the 
Sharing Operator. In the event that the han dover of the site is anticipated to be delayed due to 
any delays in procurement of equipments required to be upgraded for tower sharing, the 
Sharing Operator can supply the aforesaid equipments to M/s IDEA (subject to prior approval 
from M/s IDEA ), to expedite the handover of the site. M/s IDEA will reimburse the cost of 
such equipments to the Sharing Operator based on the cost at which the Sharing Operator 
procures the equipment or M/s IDEA's approved tendering rates for the equipment, whichever 
is the least. 
6.6 
The Sharing Operator shall be entitled to instalL maintain and operate from the Site, the TE as 
specified in the Service Order. 
6.7 
Shareable Sites: The Sharing Operator agrees that the Services at any Site, unless otherwise 
expressly agreed between the Parties, cg_n be offered by M/s IDEA, with the prior information 
to the Sharing Operator on a sharing basis with other External Sharing Operators. M/s IDEA 
agrees to give to the Sharing Operator remission in the Fees charged for the Services, as 
detailed in Schedule 3. 
6.8 
The Sharing Operator shall have no right, title or interest in any of the Sites or any portion 
thereof, including without limitation, on land or Passive Telecom Infrastructure provided by 
M/s IDEA and standing thereon. 
6.9 
Subject to M/s IDEA 's written approval, the Sharing Gperator may enter any Site before the 
Commencement Date, provided that such entry is related to engineering surveys, inspections. 
or other reasonably necessary tests required prior to construction and installation of a 
communications facility; in such cases said approval will not be unreasonably withheld. 
delayed or conditioned.

The following provisions shall govern Sharing Operator' s access to the Site: 
i. 
Installation and Routine Maintenance: Access for installation, routine maintenance and 
repair and other non-emergency visits shall be permitted as per the mutually agreed time 
schedule. 
ii. 
All work must be performed in a manner, which will not adversely affect the structural 
integrity, maintenance or marketability of the Site or any structure on the Site. No materials

the Site. 
iii. 
Such installation, maintenance, replacement and operation etc. work shall in no way damage 
or interfere with Idea's assets and/or activity or assets and/or activities of other eo-user of 
the Services at a Site.

actual diesel consumption along with necessary supporting with the BSNL and the Parties shall 
reconcile and settle the account on quarterly basis. The formula for calculating the same is as 
follows:
